overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a dark coat walking through a heavily fogged urban street. The atmosphere is tense and ominous with extremely low visibility, abandoned vehicles, and vintage brick architecture gradually emerging from the dense mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy residential street with abandoned vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously down the foggy street, surveying the obscured surroundings ahead

entered.detail: dark sedan parked on the side of the foggy street
wooden telephone pole with crossbars and wires
overhead electrical wires stretching into the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a desolate, fog-shrouded asphalt street. An abandoned car sits to the left while power lines fade into the dense gray mist ahead. The environment is completely empty and silent.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with vintage street furniture

events.description: brick buildings and street lamps emerge from the dense fog on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as structures materialize from the fog, approaching the intersection

entered.detail: ornate vintage black street lamp with glass enclosure
multi-story brick building with rounded corner facade
blue postal box or newspaper stand on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, a vintage street lamp and the silhouette of a brick corner building emerge from the fog on the right. The abandoned car and utility pole pass out of view behind as the scene opens toward an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner of historic building with marquee signage

events.description: approaching the corner building reveals a marquee sign with lettering

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance of the corner building, examining the architectural details and signage

entered.detail: illuminated sign with letters spelling PERGAMON above the entrance
doorway with steps leading into the brick building

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the corner building closely, revealing a marquee sign reading 'PERGAMON' and the building entrance. The street lamp and brick facade now dominate the right side of the frame as the fog slightly clears around the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, fog-shrouded street that gradually reveals the architecture of a silent urban corner. It begins with a character walking down an asphalt road where an abandoned car and power lines fade into a dense, oppressive gray mist. As the character progresses, the scene opens toward an intersection, allowing a vintage street lamp and the silhouette of a brick building to emerge from the haze on the right. The camera then draws closer to the structure, causing the fog to slightly clear and reveal a marquee sign reading PERGAMON above the building entrance. Finally, the brick facade and glowing lamp dominate the frame as the initial emptiness of the road gives way to the detailed entrance of the building.
